name: digital-wardrobe
description: Digital Wardrobe - 数字衣橱管理应用

scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && cd src-tauri && cargo build --release
scripts.build:mobile: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.build:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
